### Checklist

- [ ] Content is accurate and up-to-date
- [ ] Links are valid (no broken internal or external links)
- [ ] Code examples are syntactically correct and tested locally
- [ ] All code examples use placeholder keys (`sk_test_...`, `sk_sandbox_public_...`) — no real keys
- [ ] All medical examples use clearly synthetic scenarios — no real patient text
- [ ] No proprietary content included (no LLM prompt text, domain prompt suffixes, scoring weights, threshold values, or full disambiguation rule sets)
- [ ] Images and screenshots contain only synthetic data — no real patient text, no real API keys visible
- [ ] If applicable: Norwegian translation updated
- [ ] `public/_redirects` updated if any page URLs changed
